title: Google's Gemini can now spot AI-generated videos
text:
Google's Gemini can now spot AI-generated videos
2025-12-23
Google has updated its Gemini app to identify videos generated or modified by Google AI using SynthID watermark technology. The new video detection capabilities are intended to boost brand safety and fraud prevention for advertisers and media buyers. The move helps brands comply with emerging regulations like New York's Synthetic Performer Disclosure Bill, which mandates clear disclosure of AI-generated performers in ads.
